name: APEX
description: Autonomous code coverage analysis and security detection for 11 languages. Coverage gaps, CWE-mapped findings, reverse path reachability, and deployment confidence scoring.

tools.name: apex_run
tools.description: Run coverage analysis on a project. Returns uncovered branches, gap report, and coverage percentage.

lang.description: Language (python, rust, javascript, java, go, ruby, cpp, swift, csharp, kotlin)

tools.name: apex_detect
tools.description: Run security detectors. Returns findings with CWE IDs, severity, and remediation advice.

tools.name: apex_reach
tools.description: Find all entry points (tests, HTTP handlers, main) that can reach a specific code location.

entry_kind.description: Filter: test, http, main, api, cli

tools.name: apex_ratchet
tools.description: CI coverage gate. Returns PASS/FAIL with coverage percentage.

tools.name: apex_doctor
tools.description: Check that all required tools are installed.

tools.name: apex_deploy_score
tools.description: Deployment confidence score (0-100) based on coverage, security, and test health.
